pi_items.source: Industry standard attendance rounding method; FLSA-compliant; verified through Lenvica HRMS documentation and general time attendance standards (sources: Hubstaff time-clock-rounding, ClockIt rounding guidelines)

FLSA-compliant rounding interval; industry standard for attendance systems; specifically mentioned in QuickBooks timesheet rounding and Workforce.com time rounding practices as legal and standard (sources: QuickBooks timesheet rounding, Workforce.com time-clock-rounding)

Direct evidence from environment setup scripts (install_attendhrm.ps1:line 150 confirms actual path), README.md evidence_docs verification (line 23), and environment post_start setup script (setup_attendhrm.ps1:lines 369-375 show actual DEMO.FDB location)

Standard Firebird database default system administrator account; confirmed in Firebird documentation and setup scripts (setup_attendhrm.ps1:line 411); used across all isql commands in environment setup

Standard Firebird database default password for sysdba account; confirmed in Firebird security documentation (Firebird FAQ) and setup scripts (setup_attendhrm.ps1:line 411); standard default across all Firebird installations

privileged_info_summary: AttendHRM is Lenvica's real commercial HR management system using Firebird database. The rounding configuration task involves setting In Punch and Out Punch to 'Nearest' method with a 5-minute value, which are FLSA-compliant standard attendance rounding practices. The demo database (DEMO.FDB) contains 242,689 synthetic attendance records spanning 2019-2020 with 50 employees across multiple departments, created specifically for this benchmark environment. Database credentials sysdba/masterkey are standard Firebird defaults. However, the claimed database path in metadata (C:\Program Files (x86)\Lenvica\AttendHRM\Data\AttendHRM.fdb) contradicts the actual installation path (C:\Program Files (x86)\Attend HRM\Data\DEMO.FDB) as confirmed by environment setup scripts and evidence documentation.
